site_title: KMI Energy - Empowering Global Energy | Noise Reduction & Power Solutions
hero_p: Providing top-tier noise reduction, power generation, and gas regulation solutions for global energy and industrial equipment.
about_h3: Powering Every Megawatt of the Future
about_p1: Amid the surge in global power demand driven by the AI era, scalable on-site power solutions are becoming critical infrastructure. DataPower focuses on on-site power solutions, designing and delivering power plants for grid stability, large industrial projects, and mining operations.
about_p2: Our flexible, modular power generation systems can rapidly deploy megawatts of capacity in just weeks, avoiding the years required for traditional grid expansion. We are also a premium supplier for Dongfang Electric and AECC, serving global clients with technological innovation, highly competitive ROI (1/5 the price of traditional brands), and agile delivery cycles.
biz_sub: Five major business segments building a full life-cycle guarantee system for energy and industrial equipment
biz1_p: Targeting the noise control needs of energy and industrial equipment. Providing standardized and customized soundproof enclosures for gas turbine OEMs like GE and Siemens Energy. Offering turnkey solutions from acoustic design, product R&D to CFD thermal/ventilation analysis.
biz2_p: DataPower's flexible modular power generation systems can be deployed in weeks. An on-site core energy engine specifically designed to support AI computing centers, large industrial, and mining projects.
biz3_p: As a key front-end device for gas turbine power systems, it is responsible for stabilizing, regulating, and filtering high-pressure natural gas. It's the 'brain and safety valve' of the combustion system, ensuring impurity-free natural gas injection and preventing pressure fluctuation damage.
biz4_p: Relying on our global localized engineering teams, we provide professional inspection, daily maintenance, overhaul, technical upgrade, and diagnostic services.
maint_h3: Ensuring Stable Output Throughout the Equipment Life Cycle
maint_p: Relying on our localized engineering teams established globally, we provide professional inspection, maintenance, technical upgrades, and diagnostic services for gas turbines and natural gas generator sets.
maint_li1: Rapid Response: Localized layouts achieve the shortest assembly times, reducing downtime risks.
maint_li2: Full-Cycle Service: From daily maintenance and overhauls to performance optimization and spare parts replacement.
maint_li3: Professional Diagnostics: Comprehensive expert-level diagnostic systems for gas turbines and power equipment.
foot_desc: A globally leading turnkey engineering supplier for energy noise reduction and on-site power generation systems.
biz1_hero_p: 23 years focusing on noise control, comprehensive engineering service provider for noise and vibration control.
biz1_str1_d: Over 40,000m² production base, imported CNC high-precision machining centers, automatic painting lines.
biz1_str2_d: Microcrystalline damping and noise reduction technology, professional acoustic laboratory, R&D team of over 160 people.
biz1_global_p: Business covers 36 countries and regions worldwide, providing professional services for over 2000 factories. We guard clients' efficient production with professional acoustic technology.
biz2_hero_p: Rapidly deploy megawatts of power in weeks. An on-site core energy engine specifically designed to support AI computing centers and large industrial projects.
biz2_service_p: With Bowzon's over 20 years of profound accumulation in the global industrial power equipment field, we offer new and used gas generator sets, genuine spare parts, as well as turnkey solutions from professional assessment, unit recovery, deep renovation to site commissioning, ensuring full-lifecycle performance guarantee and asset appreciation.
biz3_hero_p: Building secure gas arteries for cities and industries, providing full-scenario pressure regulation solutions from high-pressure transmission to low-pressure residential distribution.
biz4_hero_p: Building a global service network spanning 36 countries and regions to provide full-lifecycle energy protection from overhaul to optimization.

biz1_products.title: Soundproof Room Series
biz1_products.desc: An environmentally friendly equipment integrating modern manufacturing industry, construction engineering, acoustic technology, and aesthetics.

biz1_products.title: Mute Room Series
biz1_products.desc: Isolating a quiet room in a noisy environment, commonly used for product testing and special occasions.

biz1_products.title: Anechoic Chamber Series
biz1_products.desc: Building a free sound field in a closed space, providing the ultimate acoustic test environment.

biz2_brands.title: GE Aerospace & Vernova
biz2_brands.desc: Supporting heavy-duty and aeroderivative units including 6B, 6F, 7E, 7HA, 9E, 9F, 9HA series.

biz2_brands.title: Siemens & Alstom
biz2_brands.desc: Comprehensive coverage of GT11N2, GT13E2, GT24, GT26 series, ensuring high efficiency and outstanding reliability.

biz2_brands.title: Ansaldo Energia
biz2_brands.desc: Covering AE64.3A, AE94.2, AE94.3A, GT36 series, deeply serving mature European heavy-duty gas turbine technologies.

biz2_models.title: GE 9HA/7HA Series
biz2_models.desc: The efficiency king of the gas turbine market, pushing performance boundaries, suitable for massive computing centers.

biz2_models.title: Alstom GT26
biz2_models.desc: Excellent operational flexibility and part-load efficiency, fast start-stop, highly adaptable to variable grid demands.

biz2_models.title: Ansaldo AE94.3A
biz2_models.desc: The perfect combination of rock-solid stability and high cost-effectiveness.

biz3_products.title: High-Medium Pressure Transmission & City Gate Stations
biz3_products.desc: Tailor-made large-scale hub skids supporting series-monitoring regulation, 1-duty 1-standby structure, equipped with gas leak alarms and electric heat tracing.

biz3_products.title: Regional Regulating & Metering Stations
biz3_products.desc: High-standard integrated systems packaged in anti-corrosion stainless steel enclosures. Covering precise flow stabilization and metering settlement.

biz3_products.title: High-Pressure Gas Filters
biz3_products.desc: The pure shield in high-pressure, large-flow environments. Filtration efficiency up to 99.8%, precision down to 10μ. Equipped with imported quick-opening blind plates.

biz3_cases.title: Tesla Shanghai Gigafactory
biz3_cases.desc: Customized medium-pressure regional regulating station with rapid response, ensuring a stable gas supply for smart manufacturing lines.

biz3_cases.title: Shanghai Disney Energy Center
biz3_cases.desc: High-end pressure regulation system with multi-line delicate distribution, meeting the fault-free operation requirements of top global theme parks.

biz3_cases.title: COMAC Shanghai Aircraft Manufacturing
biz3_cases.desc: Providing strictly standard energy hub control, assisting the production and R&D of national aviation aircraft with high-precision gas equipment.

biz3_cases.title: Municipal Gas Backbone Networks
biz3_cases.desc: Deeply serving Towngas and PetroChina Kunlun Gas city gate stations nationwide, bearing massive livelihood and industrial energy loads.

biz4_services.title: Turbine & Generator Overhaul
biz4_services.desc: Providing annual inspection, deep flaw detection, component repair, and comprehensive overhaul for mainstream gas and steam turbines.

biz4_services.title: Performance Optimization & Life Extension
biz4_services.desc: Data-driven diagnostics to implement targeted technical upgrades and district heating (Cogeneration) retrofits, significantly extending equipment lifespan.

biz4_services.title: EPC & Turnkey Delivery
biz4_services.desc: End-to-end solutions covering conceptual Engineering, precision global Sourcing (Procurement), and on-site Construction delivery.

biz4_globals.title: Global Reach
biz4_globals.desc: Our engineering services have expanded to 36 countries and regions globally, directly serving over 2,000 large industrial plants.

biz4_globals.title: Ultra-fast Localized Response
biz4_globals.desc: Stationing highly trained practical engineering teams at core global nodes to ensure immediate first-site response during emergencies。

biz4_globals.title: Supply Chain & Lifetime Support
biz4_globals.desc: Connecting upstream and downstream spare parts ecosystems, combined with cloud expert diagnostics, to provide cross-border immediate parts support and lifetime technical assistance.
